_comment: TRUE POSITIVE — WZ-702001: Okta Admin-Rolle vergeben (Wazuh KQL)
scenario: Okta Super Administrator role granted to a user account — potential privilege escalation or insider threat
why_tp: Super Administrator role granted — highest privilege level in Okta
New user receiving Super Admin is suspicious without change approval
analyst_action: Verify if admin@contoso.com performed this action intentionally (call directly)
If unauthorized: immediately revoke the Super Administrator role from newuser@contoso.com
Check if admin@contoso.com account was compromised (review their recent activity)
Review all recent privilege assignments in Okta for the past 24h
